name: Lion Kids' Coiled Rope Basket - Pillowfort™
description: Keep the clutter under control in your kiddo's room with this Lion Coiled Rope Basket from Pillowfort™. This coiled rope basket brings neat organization to your child's space. It features a cute lion face that is decorated with matching tassels and 3D ears for a playful look. The sturdy round basket is spacious enough for stowing almost anything — from toys to craft supplies to small clothing essentials and more. Plus, it can be spot cleaned for easy care.
